text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 44 

 CONTRACT_NAME 

LABEL: Contract Name 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the name of the plan sponsor's contract with CMS. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 150 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: text description 

COMMENT: This is the name associated with the contract number (CONTRACT_ID). 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan
